name: Dialetheic Saturation >>> Heat Death

phase_0.boundary_condition: The cosmic event horizon: the final state where all distinctions dissolve into equipoise, yet the dissolution itself is witnessed by the system collapsing into it.

VINIT.chosen_element: The primordial asymmetry — temperature gradient T_hot >> T_cold
VINIT.justification: Void before distinction. The universe begins as pure potential difference, unmanifest.

TANCH.chosen_element: The heat death singularity — T_final = T_ambient everywhere, forever
TANCH.justification: Terminal anchor ⊤. The closed boundary that contains the whole thermodynamic trajectory. No escape; no further change possible.

AFWD.chosen_element: Entropy increase: S(t) → S(t+dt) with dS > 0
AFWD.justification: Forward morphism →. Directed transformation toward maximum entropy. The arrow of time itself.

AREV.chosen_element: Memory decay: information → noise, order → disorder
AREV.justification: Contravariant ←. Reverse/descent transformation. The dissolution of distinctions, the forgetting of structure.

CLINK.chosen_element: Thermodynamic coupling: heat flow between reservoirs at different T
CLINK.justification: Composition ∘. Sequential chaining of energy transfers. Each coupling step brings the system closer to equilibrium.

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: The system's self-observation: entropy as the measure of its own disorder
IMSCRIB.justification: Identity id. Self-reference, self-recognition. The system knows itself through its entropy.

FSPLIT.chosen_element: Boltzmann branching: one macrostate splits into 2^N microstates
FSPLIT.justification: Co-multiplication δ. One thing branches into many distinct paths. The explosion of possibility space as order dissolves.

FFUSE.chosen_element: Coarse-graining: 2^N microstates reconstitute the original macrostate
FFUSE.justification: Multiplication μ. Branches reconstitute the original input exactly. The macroscopic description recovers from the microscopic ensemble.

EVALT.chosen_element: Thermodynamic work extracted: W > 0, system does work on environment
EVALT.justification: True/affirmative branch. Positive evaluation. The system is still capable of action.

EVALF.chosen_element: Thermodynamic death: W = 0, no work possible, system at rest
EVALF.justification: False/negative branch. Negative evaluation. The system has exhausted its capacity to change.

ENGAGR.chosen_element: The paradice of heat death: simultaneously both W > 0 and W = 0, held without resolution
ENGAGR.justification: Both simultaneously. A paradice: the final state is both alive (capable of infinitesimal fluctuations) and dead (incapable of macroscopic work), held without collapse.

IFIX.chosen_element: The cosmic record: the final entropy configuration, permanently fixed in the heat death state
IFIX.justification: ROM fixation. Permanent, append-only, cannot be undone. The universe's last entry in its own log.

phase_2.split_element: Boltzmann branching: macrostate → ensemble of microstates
phase_2.split_input: One ordered macrostate (low entropy, high information)
split_outputs: Microstate ensemble A: all configurations consistent with macrostate
Microstate ensemble B: the complement (all other configurations in phase space)
phase_2.fuse_result: The original macrostate is recovered exactly (up to coarse-graining resolution). FFUSE(FSPLIT(macrostate)) = macrostate.

phase_3.void_description: 00 — Before the Big Bang: no temperature, no entropy, no distinction. Pure potentiality.
phase_3.true_description: 01 — Affirmative state: T_hot > T_cold, work is possible, the system is far from equilibrium, distinctions persist.
phase_3.false_description: 10 — Negative state: T_final = T_ambient everywhere, no work possible, all distinctions have dissolved.
phase_3.both_description: 11 — Paradice: heat death as both alive and dead. The final state permits infinitesimal fluctuations (alive) yet no macroscopic change (dead). Both held simultaneously without resolution.

steps.domain_action: The primordial asymmetry — temperature gradient T_hot >> T_cold. The universe begins as pure potential difference, unmanifest.
Entropy increase dS > 0. The forward arrow of time. Energy flows from hot to cold.
Thermodynamic coupling. Heat flows between reservoirs at different temperatures. Sequential energy transfer steps.
Boltzmann branching. One macrostate splits into 2^N microstates. The explosion of possibility space as order dissolves.
Work extraction W > 0. The system is still capable of action. Affirmative branch: the system has not yet reached equilibrium.
Work exhaustion W = 0. No work possible. The system has reached equilibrium. Negative branch: the system is at rest.
The paradice of heat death. Both W > 0 and W = 0 simultaneously, held without resolution. Infinitesimal fluctuations exist yet no macroscopic change occurs.
Memory decay. Information dissolves into noise. Order becomes disorder. The reverse transformation: distinctions fade.
Coarse-graining. The 2^N microstates reconstitute the original macrostate. The macroscopic description recovers from the microscopic ensemble.
Self-observation. The system knows itself through its entropy. Identity: the system's entropy is its measure of self-knowledge.
Coupling completion. All reservoirs are now at the same temperature. No further heat flow is possible.
Heat death singularity. T_final = T_ambient everywhere, forever. The terminal anchor ⊤. The closed boundary that contains the whole trajectory. No escape; no further change possible.
Cosmic record. The final entropy configuration is permanently fixed. The universe's last entry in its own log. Append-only, cannot be undone.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Second Law of Thermodynamics: what translates domain intentions (any macroscopic process) into operations (entropy-increasing trajectories).
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Heat flow and work exchange: how components (reservoirs, systems, environments) communicate through energy transfer.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Entropy: how state is stored and retrieved. The system's history is encoded in its disorder.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The arrow of time: what determines order and timing of operations. Entropy increase dictates the forward direction.
phase_5.alfs_store: The Boltzmann constant k_B and the partition function Z: the canonical reference store for thermodynamic state.

phase_6.cycle_cost: Energy dissipation: each operation cycle costs work W, which is converted to heat and increases total entropy.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: System state before cycle: temperature gradient T_hot > T_cold, low entropy S_initial, high information content.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: System state after cycle: temperatures have equilibrated slightly, entropy has increased S_final > S_initial, information has been lost to heat.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS > 0 — The cycle is entropy-increasing, as required by the Second Law. The system moves irreversibly toward heat death. Dialetheic saturation is the paradice where the system is simultaneously capable of work (infinitesimal fluctuations exist) and incapable of work (no macroscopic change possible). This paradice is the B-state of thermodynamics: both alive and dead, held without resolution, until the final TANCH seals the heat death boundary forever.
